name: Cherry Chocolate Candy-Topped Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package Moist Supreme White Cake Mix
Milk chocolate candy kisses with almonds - OR -
White chocolate-striped candy kisses with almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, oil, almond extract, and eggs. Stir until just mixed.
3. Stir in the candied cherries.
4. Form the dough into 1-inch balls.
5. Place the balls on ungreased cookie sheets about 2 inches apart.
6. Bake for 6-8 minutes or until edges are lightly golden brown.
7. Immediately top each cookie with a candy kiss and press firmly down.
8. Let cool for one minute before removing from the cookie sheets.
Makes 3 dozen cookies.
Per cookie:
120 calories, 5 grams fat, 8% CFF, 15 mg cholesterol
Dietary Exchanges: 1 starch or carbohydrate and 1 fat
Note: For a new flavor, try substituting 1 teaspoon rum extract for the almond extract. Make sure cookies are cooled before packing them into containers for storage as chocolate may melt slightly when placed on the cookie sheets.
